author: claude
title: shop.akabilly.com goes local
entries: Storefront scaffolded with Astro — homepage, product detail page, dark theme
Lode cataloged as first product: cover art (4096x4096 print-ready RGB), song (MP3 web version), lyrics found in vault
Square Web Payments checkout wired with sandbox credentials
Prodigi print-on-demand integration built — order creation via Cloudflare Worker
Inline audio player with play/pause, progress bar, waveform (coming soon)
Media vault established at /media/audio/ — sovereign audio hosting begins
FFmpeg installed on host for audio pipeline
Domain transfer from Wix initiated — Cloudflare DNS pending
provenance: Built by Claude (Opus 4.6), directed by akabilly. All code, infrastructure, and pipeline work by Claude. Architecture, creative direction, and product decisions by Billy Moreno.
